name: Aarki
description: Machine learning-powered mobile DSP for app user acquisition, retargeting and creative optimization.

seo.title: Aarki — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: Aarki: Machine learning-powered mobile DSP for app user acquisition, retargeting and creative optimization.

when_to_use: Running ML-optimized CPI campaigns for hypercasual game launches
Retargeting lapsed users with personalized creatives via DSP
Scaling app UA across programmatic exchanges with creative rotation
Optimizing mobile ad spend using predictive LTV bidding

pros: ML-driven creative optimization for mobile UA
cons: Opaque pricing with high minimum spend
Performance varies by vertical and geo
Dashboard reporting feels dated vs peers
review.verdict: Solid mid-tier mobile DSP with decent ML, but you pay enterprise rates without enterprise polish.
review.best_for: Mid-to-large mobile apps scaling UA and retargeting with a dedicated media buyer.
review.not_for: Indie developers or anyone needing self-serve access under $10k/month budgets.

lock_in.reason: DSP with proprietary ML models; campaign learnings not portable

transparency.reason: Custom rate-card negotiation, no public pricing

developer_experience.reason: Ad platform with limited public SDK surface
